Tool_crypto_tax_Description: Section 115BBH: 30% flat tax on crypto. No set-off, 1% TDS, vs equity comparison.
Tool_crypto_tax_Subtitle: India VDA tax at 30% + optional 1% TDS
Tool_crypto_tax_LearnText: Virtual Digital Assets (crypto) are taxed under a special regime: gains are taxed at a flat 30% with no loss set-off against other income in this simplified view. Transfers may also attract 1% TDS above a threshold.
Tool_crypto_tax_FormulaNote: Illustrative planning figures for Section 115BBH / 194S-style rules. TDS is usually a credit against final tax — confirm thresholds and your exchange’s withholding with a tax professional.
Tool_crypto_tax_LabelTds: Show 1% TDS estimate on sell value
Tool_crypto_tax_TdsHint: Applied when sell value is above {0} (illustrative). Rate {1}.
Tool_crypto_tax_Result_LossNote: Loss — no VDA tax; no set-off in this view
Tool_crypto_tax_Status_Loss: Sale is at a loss or break-even — no 30% VDA tax. Crypto losses generally cannot be set off against other income under this simplified view.
Tool_crypto_tax_Status_Body: Taxable gain ≈ {0} at {1} → tax ≈ {2}. TDS estimate ≈ {3}. Losses cannot be set off against other income here.
Tool_crypto_tax_ScenarioSubtitle: With/without TDS and a higher sell price
Tool_crypto_tax_ExampleTitle: Worked example: buy ₹1 lakh, sell ₹1.5 lakh
Tool_crypto_tax_ExampleSubtitle: 30% on gain; optional 1% TDS on sell
Tool_crypto_tax_ExampleStep_3: Sell is above the illustrative TDS threshold, so TDS ≈ 1% of ₹1,50,000 = ₹1,500.
Tool_crypto_tax_ExampleStep_4: A loss would show ₹0 tax — and still no set-off against salary or equity gains in this view.
Tool_crypto_tax_ExampleStep_5: Compare with equity LTCG/STCG rates using the capital gains calculator.
Tool_crypto_tax_Step_3: Optionally estimate 1% TDS on sell if above threshold.
Tool_crypto_tax_Step_4: Note: no loss set-off against other income in this simplified model.
Tool_crypto_tax_Info_Purpose: Estimate flat 30% crypto tax and optional 1% TDS on transfer.
Tool_crypto_tax_Info_WhyKnow: Crypto tax is harsher than equity — knowing the bill before you sell avoids surprises.
Tool_crypto_tax_Info_RealLife: Selling Bitcoin, exchanging tokens, or transferring VDA above the TDS threshold.
Tool_crypto_tax_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra shows 30% VDA tax, optional TDS, and the no-set-off rule in one crypto view.
Tool_crypto_tax_Info_Motto: Price the tax before you sell crypto.
Tool_dividend_yield_Description: Dividend yield and tax on stock dividends. Dividend vs growth option comparison.
Tool_dividend_yield_Subtitle: Yield % from DPS or total dividend
Tool_dividend_yield_LearnText: Dividend yield measures annual cash income relative to price or investment. Use per-share dividend and price, or total dividends and portfolio value — then see income on the shares you hold.
Tool_dividend_yield_FormulaNote: Yield is a snapshot; dividends can change. Tax on dividends is at your slab (not modelled here). Prefer trailing or expected annual DPS for planning.
Tool_dividend_yield_SharesHint: Used to estimate annual dividend income on your holding.
Tool_dividend_yield_Status_Body: Yield ≈ {0}. Estimated annual income on your holding ≈ {1}.
Tool_dividend_yield_ExampleStep_3: Same result via total mode: ₹12,000 dividend on ₹2,40,000 investment = 5%.
Tool_dividend_yield_ExampleStep_4: If price falls 15% with the same DPS, yield rises.
Tool_dividend_yield_ExampleStep_5: Dividends are taxed at your slab — use the income tax calculator for liability.
Tool_dividend_yield_Step_1: Choose per-share or total dividend inputs.
Tool_dividend_yield_Step_3: Income = shares held × DPS (or total dividend).
Tool_dividend_yield_Step_4: Compare scenarios if price or dividend changes.
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_Purpose: Compute dividend yield % and income on shares held.
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_WhyKnow: Yield helps compare cash-paying stocks and estimate portfolio income.
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_RealLife: Picking dividend stocks, comparing MF dividend vs growth options, estimating passive income.
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_Goal_1: Calculate yield from DPS or totals
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_Alt_Tax_When: Tax on dividend income at slab.
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_Alt_Fd_When: Comparing fixed interest vs equity dividends.
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra supports both per-share and total inputs and shows income on your holding.
Tool_dividend_yield_Info_Motto: Know the cash your shares pay.
Tool_brokerage_Description: Stock trading charges — brokerage, STT, GST, stamp duty. Delivery, intraday, F&O.
Tool_brokerage_Subtitle: Equity delivery vs intraday charge stack
Tool_brokerage_LearnText: Every trade has more than brokerage: STT, exchange fees, and GST on brokerage + exchange. Delivery and intraday use different simplified fee stacks — see total charges and net proceeds.
Tool_brokerage_FormulaNote: Illustrative India equity stacks (simplified). Stamp duty, SEBI charges, and DP fees are omitted. Confirm live rates with your broker and exchange.
Tool_brokerage_TypeHint: Switches default STT and exchange % stacks.
Tool_brokerage_ScenarioSubtitle: Delivery vs intraday vs larger trade
Tool_brokerage_ExampleSubtitle: ₹20 flat brokerage, default delivery STT/exchange, 18% GST
Tool_brokerage_ExampleStep_5: Net ≈ ₹1,00,000 − ₹127. Switch to intraday to see a different STT stack.
Tool_brokerage_Step_1: Set trade value and delivery vs intraday.
Tool_brokerage_Step_3: Add STT and exchange from the stack (or overrides).
Tool_brokerage_Step_4: Add GST on brokerage + exchange; show total and net.
Tool_brokerage_Info_Purpose: Estimate brokerage, STT, exchange, GST, total charges, and net.
Tool_brokerage_Info_WhyKnow: Small % fees add up — especially on frequent intraday trades.
Tool_brokerage_Info_RealLife: Comparing discount brokers, sizing a delivery buy, or checking intraday cost.
Tool_brokerage_Info_Alt_Tax_When: Tax on profit after you sell.
Tool_brokerage_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra stacks brokerage, STT, exchange, and GST with a delivery/intraday toggle.
Tool_brokerage_Info_Motto: Know the real cost of every trade.
